source_pr.title: ddl: fix the error using default timestamp
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #31968 

Problem Summary:

The implementation of default expression in `alter table` is not in the same place with directly querying. 

### What is changed and how it works?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- bugfix or new feature needs a release note -->

```release-note
Release Version: v5.4.0-alpha-1017-gbfb05d27f
Edition: Community
Git Commit Hash: bfb05d27f71e672db67927bd6717ef840696cfcd
Git Branch: column_default_expr
UTC Build Time: 2022-03-01 07:18:53
GoVersion: go1.16
Race Enabled: false
TiKV Min Version: v3.0.0-60965b006877ca7234adaced7890d7b029ed1306
Check Table Before Drop: false
```

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky around DDL/schema changes where schema propagation is asynchronous. This PR stabilizes it by: ddl: fix the error using default timestamp.
fix_pattern: ddl: fix the error using default timestamp
